postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && curl https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt/doc/apt-key.gpg | sudo apt-key add - && echo 'deb https://packages.cloud.google.com/apt cloud-sdk main' | sudo tee -a /etc/apt/sources.list.d/google-cloud-sdk.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y google-cloud-sdk
